name: SubPipe
description: Pipeline inspection dataset focused on structured underwater environments with ground-truth trajectories.

name: SOTRUE
description: Underwater image dataset captured across graded turbidity levels (turbid0-turbid5), each with repeated trials, for robustness studies.
citation:
@inproceedings{marburg2025sotrue,
  author    = {Marburg, Aaron and Micatka, Marc},
  title     = {A Dataset for the Assessment of Underwater {SLAM} Degradation in Turbid Water},
  booktitle = {OCEANS 2025 - Great Lakes},
  year      = {2025},
  month     = sep,
  pages     = {1--5},
  address   = {Chicago, IL, USA},
  publisher = {IEEE},
  doi       = {10.23919/OCEANS59106.2025.11245072},
  note      = {Introduces the Stereo Observations in TuRbid Underwater Environments (SOTRUE) dataset}
}

name: EiffelTower
description: Multi-year underwater survey (2015-2020) around the Eiffel Tower deep-sea vent. Suitable for long-term SLAM, temporal change analysis, and relocalization.
citation:
@article{boittiaux2023eiffel,
  title   = {Eiffel Tower: A deep-sea underwater dataset for long-term visual localization},
  author  = {Boittiaux, Cl{\'e}mentin and Dune, Claire and Ferrera, Maxime and Arnaubec, Aur{\'e}lien and Marxer, Ricard and Matabos, Marjolaine and Van Audenhaege, Lo{\"i}c and Hugel, Vincent},
  journal = {The International Journal of Robotics Research},
  volume  = {42},
  number  = {9},
  pages   = {689--699},
  year    = {2023},
  publisher = {SAGE Publications},
  doi     = {10.1177/02783649231177322}
}

name: Aqualoc Archaeological Site
description: Large-scale underwater visual SLAM sequences at deep archaeological sites, with camera trajectories and challenging turbidity/lighting.
citation:
@article{ferrera2019aqualoc,
  title   = {{AQUALOC}: An Underwater Dataset for Visual-Inertial-Pressure Localization},

  year    = {2019},
  publisher = {SAGE Publications},
  doi     = {10.1177/0278364919883346}
}

name: Aqualoc Harbor Site
description: Shallow-water harbor sequences of the Aqualoc visual SLAM dataset, with camera trajectories and challenging turbidity/lighting.

name: SOLAQUA
description: SINTEF Ocean Large Aquaculture Robotics Dataset: net-following, manual-control and calibration sequences recorded by an underwater robot in an operational fish farm (63 sequences total).
modalities: Mono + stereo cameras, multibeam sonar, DVL, USBL, IMU, baro

name: SOVIS
description: Sonar-visual dataset for cross-modal underwater perception: ~76.6k paired multibeam-sonar/camera frames over 17 dives at six Trondheimfjord sites. Data not yet publicly released.
